✅ PDF Compressed!

⚠️ Note: PDF compression works by re-compressing embedded images. PDFs that are mostly text will see minimal size reduction. For maximum results, use quality 40–60%.

Advertisement
Sidebar ad

What gets compressed?

  • 📷 Embedded JPEG images
  • 🖼️ Embedded PNG images
  • ✅ Preserves text & layout
  • ✅ Preserves links
  • ⚠️ Text-only PDFs: minimal effect

Privacy

Your PDF never leaves your device. Everything runs locally in your browser using PDF.js and Canvas API.

PDF Compression FAQ

It depends on the PDF content. Image-heavy PDFs can shrink 50–80%. Text-only PDFs will see little change since text is already compact.

Yes. Your PDF is processed entirely in your browser. It is never uploaded to any server. You can even use this tool offline.

Yes. Only embedded images are re-compressed. All text, fonts, links, and structure are preserved.

For documents (reports, invoices), 60% works well. For photo-heavy PDFs, try 50%. For print quality, keep it at 80%+.
